steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to introduce both Samuel Selvon and his novel The Lonely Londoners to a new audience—which means naming both and providing essential context.

steps.title: Match to the goal
steps.content:
Choice A names Samuel Selvon as a Trinidadian author, identifies The Lonely Londoners as his most celebrated novel, dates it to 1956, and explains what it's about.

The other choices either omit Selvon's name—C just says “a Trinidadian author”—or focus on an irrelevant relationship between two novels (B and D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
